name: space_analysis_list_free_wall_space_on_wall
desc: Project every door/window/opening/hosted family onto the wall's axis and return the remaining free intervals with start, end and length (mm).

parameters.name: min_free_length_mm
parameters.description: Optional — only return free spans at least this long (mm). Default 0.
